# Security Improvement Proposal (SIP)

## Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the suggested improvement to Sentinel's security engine or operational governance.

## Rationale

Why is this improvement necessary? What specific threat vector or operational gap does it address? 

## Technical Details

Describe the proposed implementation. If this involves a new heuristic, provide the detection logic or mathematical model.

## Benchmark Impact

How will this affect the False Positive Rate (FPR) and True Positive Recall (TPR)? 
- [ ] This proposal includes an update to `scripts/benchmark_suite.js`.
- [ ] This proposal maintains the 0% False Positive baseline.

## Auditability Compliance

- [ ] Does this change implement a new `rule_id` in the `SARB-` namespace?
- [ ] Does it include a formal `explanation` for SOC forensics?
